title: chrysocephalum semicalvum subsp. vinaceum
intro: Chrysocephalum semicalvum subsp. vinaceum, also known as yellow buttons, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil and flavonoids. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Chrysocephalum semicalvum subsp. vinaceum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
